reviews.review_title: Do not play unless u want to get doxxed.
reviews.review_description: First of all the owner is actually underaged. He is 12 and obviously sounds 12 to. Second of he doxxed a mod named frootloops and a someone im familiar with named butter PAYED for a supporter badge and then got mod. But lost it only because is grandpa was in the hospital FOR A WEEK. If you want your location to be revealed play this game for some reason. If you want to be safe. STAY AWAY FROM THE COMMUNITY. This game also barely has anything good. Literally everything in spawn is cash grabs. They bribe you to buy it and get a prize in return then say a “good” reason why they demoted you. Horrible game and community you made Soos.
